🏡 ESTATE SALE ALERT! 🏡

Join us this weekend at 4215 W Overland Rd, Boise, ID 83705!

Friday May 29 & Saturday May 30, 2026
9am - 4pm both days

Highlights include mid-century furniture, vintage tools, full kitchen, collectibles, and much more!

No early birds please. Cash and cards accepted.

New sale coming up! 831 N Latah St, Boise 83706
Dates: June 5, 6, and 7
Times: 8am to 3pm

Furniture, antiques, jewelry, tools, and lots more. Check our website for photos!
Thank you to everyone who came out to our sale last weekend! We had a wonderful turnout. Stay tuned for our next sale announcement coming soon! Follow us to be notified first. 🙏

HUGE sale in Meridian!

📍 3740 E Fairview Ave, Meridian ID 83642
📅 Saturday June 13 only, 8am-2pm

This one is packed — full household contents, garage items, vintage clothing, and a massive book collection. Don't miss it!
